Shadow President

Mentions Timeline (14 articles)
3310-08-29
Jerome Archer and Nakato Kaine Increase Supporters
As Zachary Hudson prepares to leave office, Federal groups shift allegiance to Jerome Archer as shadow president, while Nakato Kaine gains Alliance support opposing Edmund Mahon's Sirius partnership.
3310-08-22
Kumo Crew Claims Responsibility for Nanomam 1 Explosion
The Kumo Crew claims responsibility for an explosion targeting Shadow President-elect Jerome Archer on Nanomam 1, also implying responsibility for the earlier ambush on Emperor Arissa.
3309-12-04
Archer Outlines Shadow Presidency Future
Vice President Jerome Archer discusses the election, his security-first policies, relationship with Hudson, and plans to rebuild the Republican Party as shadow president.
3309-11-13
Winters Resists Hudson’s Legacy Projects
President-elect Winters vows to block Hudson's legacy legislation and close the PDB, while Core Dynamics' CEO warns about military spending cuts.
3309-10-12
Sol Celebrations End as Election Begins
Federal voting begins after Sol celebrations conclude, with profiles of both candidates and their running mates.
3309-10-05
Celebrations in Sol for Federal Election
President Hudson announces celebratory events in Sol for the upcoming Federal election, with a temporary permit for Pilots' Federation members.
3307-03-30
Federal Congress Grants Emergency Surveillance Powers
Vice President Jerome Archer has successfully proposed a new public surveillance law designed to prevent future terrorist attacks in The Federation.
3307-03-26
Jasmina Halsey Becomes Federal Ambassador
Former President Jasmina Halsey has joined The Federal Diplomatic Corps to become an ambassador to the Alliance.
3307-03-15
Superpowers Respond to ‘Nine Martyrs’ Attack
Political fallout has been intense after The NMLA simultaneously bombed nine starports in the Alliance, Empire and Federation.
3307-03-08
The Declaration of Archon Delaine
At The Galactic Summit, the infamous pirate leader Archon Delaine has demanded to be accepted As the legitimate leader of a political power.
3307-02-26
Historic Meetings at the Galactic Summit
Alliance, Empire and Federation leaders have held their first ever face-to-face discussions at The diplomatic conference in The Sirius system.
3307-02-22
Hudson and Winters Confirmed for Galactic Summit
President Zachary Hudson and Shadow President Felicia Winters will both attend The diplomatic conference in The Sirius system.
3307-01-20
Jasmina Halsey Returns to the Federation
Former President Jasmina Halsey has arrived on Mars to stand as a witness in The upcoming trial of Fleet Admiral Lucas Vincent.
3307-01-08
Aegis Supports Galactic Summit
The organisation Aegis has expressed support for Utopia’s offer to host a Galactic Summit for All three superpowers.
